news.headline: SOON: TRUMP ATTENDS STATE DINNER WITH QATAR

news.summary: EMRELIS has been authorized as the pioneering therapy specifically for individuals with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who have undergone prior treatment and demonstrate notable high levels of c-Met protein. These patients typically encounter a grim prognosis and confront restricted treatment alternatives. It is noteworthy that lung cancer persists as the primary contributor to cancer-related fatalities globally.
news.headline: U.S. FDA approves EMRELIS for previously treated advanced NSCLC patients with high c-Met protein overexpression.

news.summary: UrVenue, a top booking technology provider for hospitality experiences, was recently recognized for revolutionizing how resorts handle and profit from bookable experiences. The company's innovative Property Experience Management System, known as PXMS, has received acclaim for its transformative impact on the industry. This honor was announced in Las Vegas on May 14, 2025. UrVenue's platform is changing the way resorts manage their offerings, leading to an increase in revenue and enhanced customer satisfaction.
news.headline: UrVenue wins "Overall Reservation Solution Provider of the Year" award at TravelTech Breakthrough Awards. LAS VEGAS, May 14, 2025.

news.summary: XRP has surged by 65% in a month, rising from a low of $1.61 to $2.65 by May 14, driven by whale accumulation and easing US-China trade tensions. Technical analysis suggests a potential 45% rally, with a target near $3.69 by June, supported by exponential moving averages. The liquidation heatmap indicates a key resistance level at $2.68, with potential liquidations of $17.33 million, and a breakout could drive the price towards $2.87. A symmetrical triangle pattern suggests long-term targets of $5.24 and even $17 based on Fibonacci projections. It is advised for readers to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: XRP surged 65% in a month to $2.65, eyeing $2.87 resistance. Technicals predict a potential rally to $3.69, reaching $5.24 and possibly $17 long-term.

news.summary: American Eagle Outfitters Inc. announced a profit warning and retracted its full-year 2025 guidance. The company foresees first-quarter revenue of $1.1 billion, indicating a 5% decrease from the previous year. Comparable sales are expected to decline by approximately 3%, specifically with the American Eagle brand down by 2% and the Aerie brand down by 4%. The company anticipates an operating loss of around $85 million, which is adjusted to $68 million. This decision was made due to the uncertainty of the broader macroeconomic environment. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: American Eagle Outfitters issues profit warning, expects $1.1 billion in Q1 revenue (-5% YoY) and projects 3% decline in comparable sales. Operating loss estimated at $85 million. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: The company cbdMD (AMEX: YCBD) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, May 15th, 2025. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.36 for cbdMD. Investors will be eager to see if the company surpasses this estimate and are also looking for any additional information the company may offer during the announcement. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: cbdMD (AMEX: YCBD) to release quarterly earnings with analysts expecting an EPS of $-0.36; investors hopeful for positive results.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, the Board of Trustees of The GDL Fund (NYSE:GDL) announced a cash distribution of $0.12 per share for common shareholders. The distribution will be paid on June 23, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 13, 2025.
news.headline: The GDL Fund announces a $0.12 per share distribution payable on June 23, 2025, to shareholders of record on June 13.

news.summary: At EHA2025, Aptose has been chosen to present data from the TUSCANY Phase 1/2 clinical trial of Tuspetinib triplet therapy in newly diagnosed AML. This oral presentation highlights significant findings from the trial, showcasing the efficacy and safety of the treatment regimen. The TUSCANY trial enrolled over 100 newly diagnosed AML patients, with the results indicating promising outcomes for this novel therapy approach. The selection for presentation at EHA2025 underscores the potential impact of Tuspetinib triplet therapy in the field of AML research and treatment.
news.headline: Aptose to present TUSCANY trial data on Tuspetinib triplet therapy for AML at EHA2025.

news.summary: On Wednesday, Palantir stock surged to a historic peak alongside the Nasdaq composite's rise. The stock entered a buy zone with a remarkable 71% increase in 2025. This growth signifies a significant milestone for Palantir as it continues to perform well in the market.
news.headline: Palantir stock reaches all-time high as Nasdaq gains, with a 71% increase in 2025.

news.summary: The first-quarter results of Walmart are set to be released early on Thursday, shedding light on the impact of the evolving tariff situation. Investors are eagerly anticipating the update from the retail giant amidst the uncertainty surrounding Trump's tariffs. The stock of Walmart is currently hovering between buy points as anticipation grows. Stay tuned to learn more about Walmart's position on the tariffs and the overall market response to their earnings report.
news.headline: Walmart's Q1 results due Thursday, amidst tariff concerns. Stock at buy points, investors cautious.

news.summary: Following the release of its Q1 report, Tencent’s stock saw an increase in value as the China tech company highlighted a rise in gaming sales and AI-driven advertising. This growth in sales marked the highest level in four years for Tencent, prompting a positive response from investors.
news.headline: Tencent stock rises with Q1 report showing sales growth at best level in 4 years, driven by gaming and AI advertising.

news.summary: Stocks related to artificial intelligence, with Nvidia leading the way, increased for two consecutive days after reports of significant business agreements in Saudi Arabia. Saudi Arabia emerged as a key purchaser of AI chips, replacing China in that role.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia becoming big buyer of AI chips, boosting AI stocks led by Nvidia. Second day of rise in stock post major deals.

news.summary: In a strategic move within the enterprise market, Databricks, a competitor to Snowflake, has purchased database startup Neon for a substantial $1 billion. This acquisition underscores the intensifying competition between the two software companies in the AI sector.
news.headline: Databricks acquires Neon in $1B deal, intensifying AI battle with Snowflake in enterprise market.

news.summary: On Tuesday, Morgan Stanley downgraded Cboe from overweight to underweight due to the impact of lowered Trump tariffs on market volatility. This change comes as trading volatility decreases, causing exchanges to lose momentum. The downgrade reflects a shift in market conditions, with Cboe facing challenges as a result.
news.headline: Morgan Stanley downgrades Cboe from overweight to underweight due to reduced market volatility from lowered Trump tariffs.

news.summary: A well-known pavement striping company has recently opened a new franchise branch in Dayton, Ohio. This location offers property owners budget-friendly striping solutions for damaged parking lots, sport courts, and indoor areas. Launched on April 7, this is the latest addition to the growing network of 1-800-STRIPER® franchises.
news.headline: 1-800-STRIPER® franchise now open in Dayton, offering affordable striping for parking lots, sport courts, and interior spaces.

news.summary: Track Group, Inc., a leader in offender tracking and monitoring services, reported its financial results for Q2 FY25, ending March 31, 2025. The company's total revenue for Q2 FY25 was $8.4M, a 7% decrease from Q2 FY24's $9.0M. Gross profit in Q2 FY25 was $4.1M, up 4% from Q2 FY24's $4.0M. Operating income for Q2 FY25 was $0.04M, a significant improvement from the operating loss of ($0.96M) in Q2 FY24. Net loss attributable to shareholders in Q2 FY25 was ($0.5M), down from ($1.9M) in Q2 FY24. Adjusted EBITDA for Q2 FY25 was $1.3M, compared to $0.8M for Q2 FY24. The cash balance at March 31, 2025, was $3.4M. Despite challenges, Track Group remains resilient and focused on strategic reinvestment in technology. The company's outlook for FY25 includes revenue projections of $34.5-35.5M and an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 13.5-16.5%. Track Group's products and services cater to security, law enforcement, and correctional organizations globally. For more information, visit www.trackgrp.com.
news.headline: Track Group, Inc. reports Q2 FY25 results with $8.4M revenue, $4.1M gross profit. Operating income improves 105%. Cash: $3.4M. Net loss ($0.5).

news.summary: In the first quarter, Nayax Ltd. (NASDAQ: NYAX) announced a strong performance with earnings of 19 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 4 cents. However, the company's quarterly sales were reported at $81.11 million, falling short of the expected $85.59 million. Nayax expressed satisfaction with their progress in 2025, focusing on enhancing profitable revenue growth, boosting recurring revenue, broadening market share, and extending market presence. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nayax (NASDAQ: NYAX) Q1 earnings: EPS of 19 cents beat estimates, sales at $81.11M miss at $85.59M. Positively reviewed 2025 goals.

news.summary: On Thursday, May 15, 2025, Data Storage (NASDAQ: DTST) is scheduled to announce its quarterly earnings. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.10 for the company. Investors are eagerly awaiting the news, with expectations of Data Storage exceeding these estimates and offering positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. The market sentiment is optimistic as stakeholders brace for the announcement. For more detailed information, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Data Storage (NASDAQ: DTST) to report earnings on 2025-05-15 with anticipated EPS of $0.10, optimism for exceeding estimates.

news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on May 14, 2025, Neuberger Berman, a prominent global investment manager, and the Public Investment Fund (PIF) have agreed to a non-binding memorandum of understanding ("MoU"). The purpose of this MoU is to catalyze the expansion of Saudi Arabia and Middle Eastern capital markets. This partnership seeks to leverage the expertise and resources of both parties to drive growth in these markets.
news.headline: Neuberger Berman and PIF will collaborate for a US $6 billion investment program to boost regional capital markets.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Oakdale, California, Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), was honored by Best Companies Group as one of the top workplaces in Central Valley for 2025. Additionally, OVCB received recognition from Opportunity Stanislaus for fueling economic growth by expanding its workforce by over 10% in 2024.
news.headline: Oak Valley Community Bank named one of Central Valley’s Best Places to Work, growing their workforce by 10% in 2024.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on May 14, 2025, West Red Lake Gold Mines Ltd. ("West Red Lake Gold" or "the Company") revealed the drawdown of the remaining US$12.5 million, referred to as the "Final Tranche," from its initially disclosed US$35 million credit facility, known as the "Credit Facility." This transaction involved Nebari Natural Resources Credit Fund II LP ("Nebari"). West Red Lake Gold's stock is listed on the TSXV as WRLG and on the OTCQB as WRLGF.
news.headline: West Red Lake Gold draws final US$12.5M under Nebari Credit Facility after previously announced US$35M credit.

news.summary: Scala Data Centers has solidified its dominance by obtaining authorization to handle the increasing data-processing and artificial-intelligence demands from major global enterprises. This move will enable Scala Data Centers to effectively manage the surge in workload. The authorization was granted on May 14, 2025, in São Paulo, reinforcing the company's leadership position in the industry.
news.headline: Brazil's Ministry of Mines and Energy approves 5 GW power connection for Scala AI City in Rio Grande do Sul, meeting global enterprise data demands.

news.summary: Unison Mortgage Corporation, a subsidiary of Unison, revealed the introduction of its Equity Sharing Home Loan in Nevada on May 14, 2025. The monthly payments offered by this new option are approximately one-third lower than those of traditional loans. This reduced financial burden can provide crucial flexibility for American families.
news.headline: Unison Mortgage Corp introduced Equity Sharing Home Loan in Nevada, with monthly payments one-third of traditional options.

news.summary: Highlighting innovative breakthroughs, inventions, and ideas that are reshaping the limits of achievement, the renowned Globee® Awards has released the Call for Entries for their esteemed business awards programs on May 14, 2025. The awards, which are recognized globally and attract participation from across industries, aims to honor game-changing initiatives that push boundaries and redefine what is achievable.
news.headline: 17th Annual Globee® Awards seeking entries for innovative breakthroughs, inventions, and ideas, now open.

news.summary: ALTAVISTA, Virginia, May 14, 2025 - Pinnacle Bankshares Corporation, the parent company of First National Bank, disclosed a recent dividend declaration. The company's Board of Directors approved a dividend payout of $0.26 per share on May 13, 2025. This dividend is set to be distributed on June 6, 2025, to shareholders holding positions as of May 23, 2025. Pinnacle Bankshares Corporation is traded on the OTCQX under the symbol PPBN.
news.headline: Pinnacle Bankshares Corp declares $0.26 per share dividend, payable June 6, 2025, to shareholders of record on May 23, 2025.

news.summary: Ensurge Micropower ASA, traded as ENSU on the Oslo Stock Exchange, is set to announce its first quarter results for 2025 on Thursday, May 15, 2025. Investors and stakeholders are anticipating the release to gain insights into the company's financial performance and strategic direction. The announcement is scheduled to provide crucial information about the company's revenue, profits, and overall market position for the first quarter of 2025. Market analysts and shareholders will closely examine these results to assess the company's growth trajectory and investment potential.
news.headline: Ensurge Micropower ASA (OSE: ENSU) to release Q1 2025 results on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent study, it was found that the global number of COVID-19 cases has surpassed 10 million, with over 500,000 reported deaths. The United States remains the country with the highest number of cases, accounting for over 2.5 million infections and 125,000 deaths. Brazil follows closely behind with more than 1.3 million cases and 57,000 deaths. The World Health Organization has warned that the pandemic is far from over and that countries need to remain vigilant in their efforts to contain the virus. The situation remains grim as many regions are experiencing a resurgence in cases after easing lockdown measures. Authorities are urging the public to continue practicing social distancing and wearing masks to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: Seplat from Nigeria anticipates first-half revenue to surpass last year's $1.1B.

news.summary: A significant number of flights have experienced delays at the bustling hub due to radar malfunctions, a scarcity of air traffic controllers, and ongoing construction on a runway.
news.headline: Newark Airport facing delays with multiple issues - radar outages, air traffic controller shortages, runway construction.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in New York, the University of Medicine and Health Sciences (UMHS), recognized for its focus on student achievement and a track record of placing graduates in residencies in the US and Canada, commemorates a significant milestone. The institution, known for its small size and dedicated approach, marks another successful chapter in its history.
news.headline: UMHS celebrates historic Match Day for graduating students with successful residency placements in US & Canada.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in New York, it was highlighted that Memorial Day serves as a time to commemorate the bravery, selflessness, and dedication of our country's heroes. StarknightMT emphasized the importance of expressing appreciation by fully embracing the freedom that these heroes have defended. This belief underscores the essence of Memorial Day, encouraging individuals to honor the sacrifices made for the nation's liberty.
news.headline: StarknightMT's Memorial Day Sale offers exclusive savings to honor heroes; marks courage, sacrifice, and service.

news.summary: Sony Group Corp, a technology giant and video game company trading on NYSE under the symbol SONY, is bracing for potential setbacks due to tariffs imposed on countries like China and Japan. In its recent announcement, Sony disclosed its fourth-quarter financial results, unveiling quarterly sales of $17.24 billion. This marked a significant 24% decrease compared to the previous year and fell short of the $20.4 billion estimate predicted by financial analysts. Specifically, its Game & Network Services segment experienced a 4.2% drop in sales year-over-year. The company managed to sell 2.8 million PlayStation 5 units during the quarter, a decline from 4.5 million sold in the same period a year ago and a stark drop from the 9.5 million units sold in the third quarter, which encompassed the lucrative Christmas shopping season. Looking ahead, Sony offered guidance for the upcoming year, cautioning of a potential $680 million financial impact due to various factors.
news.headline: Sony faces $680 million tariff impact, mulls moving PS5 production to US. Reported Q4 sales of $17.24 billion, down 24% YoY, sold 2.8M PS5s.

news.summary: In Rye, New York, on May 14, 2025, the Board of Trustees of Ellsworth Growth and Income Fund Ltd. announced a cash distribution of $0.16 per share for common shareholders. This distribution will be payable on June 23, 2025, to shareholders of record on June 13, 2025. The quarterly distribution of $0.16 marks a significant 23% increase from the previous $0.13 per share, raising the annual distribution rate from $0.52 to $0.64 per share. This increase comes after the Fund achieved a market total return of 27% in 2024, showcasing its strong performance.
news.headline: Ellsworth Growth and Income Fund Ltd. (NYSE: ECF) raises quarterly distribution by 23% to $0.16 per share from $0.13.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Rye, New York, The Gabelli Global Small and Mid Cap Value Trust (NYSE: GGZ) announced a cash distribution of $0.16 per share. This distribution will be paid on June 23, 2025, to common shareholders recorded on June 13, 2025.
news.headline: Gabelli Global Small and Mid Cap Value Trust announces $0.16 per share distribution on May 14, payable on June 23, to record holders on June 13, 2025.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Rye, New York, The Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust (NYSE:GDV) has decided to maintain their fixed monthly cash distributions. The Board of Trustees has announced cash distributions of $0.14 per share for July, August, and September 2025. This decision ensures consistent income flow for shareholders invested in the fund.
news.headline: Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust continues $0.14/share monthly distributions for July, August, and September 2025.

news.summary: A group called Women We Admire has recently revealed The Top 50 Women Leaders of Oregon for the year 2025 in a statement made in New York on May 14, 2025. This list showcases the most influential women in the state, spanning various locations from seaside towns to unique cities surrounded by mountains.
news.headline: Women We Admire reveals Top 50 Women Leaders of Oregon for 2025. Recognition to women making a difference.

news.summary: Announced on May 14, 2025, in Austin, Texas, Ordoro, a prominent player in eCommerce logistics and inventory management, unveiled its latest upgrade, Version 2 (V2). This update allows ecommerce merchants to tap into Amazon's logistics network more swiftly and effortlessly without the need for Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA). With this enhancement, merchants can leverage Amazon's network efficiently to enhance their logistical operations.
news.headline: Ordoro launches Amazon Shipping V2, providing quicker access to logistics network without FBA. May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Payroc has introduced Roc Giving, an online platform tailored to assist non-profit organizations, churches, and charities in enhancing fundraising initiatives. The platform features customizable donation pages, tiered giving choices, and advanced analytics tools. Through providing online donation capabilities and payment processing services, Payroc aims to streamline fundraising operations for these entities.
news.headline: Payroc introduces Roc Giving platform for nonprofits, churches, charities with customized donation pages and analytics.

news.summary: HTVRONT introduces LOKLiK iPaint, the first-ever AI-driven painting device, aiming to provide custom artwork to a broader audience. The unveiling took place in Spokane, Washington on May 14, 2025. HTVRONT and LOKLiK collaborated on this innovative machine, offering a new way to create personalized art.
news.headline: HTVRONT introduces LOKLiK iPaint: AI-powered painting machine for easy art creation. May 14, 2025.

news.summary: A community in Brooklyn is coming together to support the physical and mental wellness of Black men. Taking place on May 14, 2025, the Black Man's Health Festival 2025 is organized by Heart, Body & Soul, Inc. (HBS). This event aims to champion the health of Black men through a two-day experience that promises to be unforgettable.
news.headline: The Black Man's Health Festival 2025 is back in Brooklyn with a bigger and bolder event championing black men's wellness.

news.summary: Andres Rugerio, a veteran with over 24 years of service at InspiriTec, has been honored with the SourceAmerica Honor Role for Veterans Award. This prestigious award is bestowed upon veterans with service-related disabilities who have shown exceptional accomplishments in their professional endeavors. Rugerio's commendable dedication and performance in the workplace have earned him this recognition.
news.headline: Andres Rugerio from InspiriTec wins SourceAmerica Veterans Award for his 24 years of service, praised for outstanding achievement.

news.summary: A transformation project totaling $22 million has revamped the Four Seasons Residence Club Aviara in San Diego, offering a new California coastal aesthetic to its villa and residence rentals. The renovation, completed on May 14, 2025, has introduced thoughtful design elements to enhance the resort-style experience.
news.headline: Four Seasons Residence Club Aviara undergoes $22M renovation, now features fresh California coastal style.
